features.name: Project scaffold
features.description: Next.js + Tailwind + TypeScript + Framer Motion setup, dev server running

features.name: Sidebar navigation
features.description: Fixed left sidebar (desktop) with name, nav links with icons, Download CV button, social links. Hamburger menu on mobile. Space Grotesk font.

features.name: Hero section
features.description: Large name 'Dylan Wu', sub tagline, location. Typing animation. Background data viz simulation. CTA buttons. Content from CLAUDE.md.

features.name: Domain expertise bento grid
features.description: 6 bento cards in grid layout. Each card: icon, domain title, description hidden until hover/click. Hover reveals description with slide-up animation. Cards have left accent bar on hover. Content from CLAUDE.md.

features.name: Experience timeline
features.description: 5 entries with company, role, period, domain. Alternating left/right layout on desktop. Vertical line connector. Diamond markers. Content from CLAUDE.md.

features.name: Tech stack section
features.description: 4 function groups with tools. Animated skill bars. Grid of tool icons. Data sources line. Content from CLAUDE.md.

features.name: Education section
features.description: USC and University of Iowa entries. Clean, minimal layout. Content from CLAUDE.md.

features.name: Contact section
features.description: Inquiry form (project type, email, message). LinkedIn + GitHub links. No visible email address. Footer with copyright.

features.name: Responsive mobile layout
features.description: All sections work on mobile. Sidebar collapses to hamburger. Timeline stacks vertically. Bento grid stacks to single column.

features.name: Animations and polish
features.description: Typing animation in hero. Hover effects on domain cards. Scroll-triggered skill bar animations. Smooth scroll between sections. Scanline overlay. Framer Motion transitions.
